violations.text: Bakery items packaged in the food establishment are lacking labels. Food packaged in a food establishment must be labeled with the common name of the food, a list of ingredients, the quantity of the contents, and the business name/address. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 04/16/2026
Gaskets at the 3 door reach-in refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
Caulking at handsink in the kitchen was observed worn down exposing dry wall. New Violation. Correct By: 05/16/2026
Gaskets at the 3 door reach-in refrigerator were observed in poor repair. Equipment to be in good repair and proper adjustment. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025

1. The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. 2. The facility is lacking thermo labels or similar internal temperature indicating device for the dish machine in the kitchen. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the 3 bay sink backsplash was observed with an accumulation of black residue. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
Light shield for ceiling light in kitchen observed in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
